title: Wisteria
description: This resource pack adds beautiful wisteria hanging from the roofs of lush caves (Replaces cave vines)
body:
# **Description**
Wisteria is a resource pack that takes your minecraft lush caves to the next level! It adds not only a new beautiful pink plant to decorate your builds with, but also new berries that make exploring caves a much more exotic experience!

This pack takes a minecrafty spin on the normal real life wisteria and now the plant grows magical enchanted berries for you to discover on your journeys around the minecraft world!

## Here is an example:
![An example of wisteria in caves.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc9473299e2b3221d9f948147e1ad4d630364db0.png)

# **Features**
- Wisteria generates in caves
- Enchanted berries grow on wisteria
- Enchanted berries - Blue berries (1/2 a hunger bar)
- Randomly generated textures for wisteria and wisteria with berries
- Wisteria growing berries emit light


<details>
<summary>Supported Versions</summary>

1.21x
1.20x

</details>
